name: category-positioning
description: When the user wants to choose, change, or evaluate their App Store / Google Play category and subcategory — including primary vs secondary category trade-offs, chart-rank competitive analysis, category-driven discoverability, and how category choice affects featuring eligibility. Use when the user mentions "which category", "App Store category", "primary category", "secondary category", "change my category", "Health & Fitness vs Lifestyle", "Productivity vs Utilities", "rank higher in a smaller
author: Eronred
summary_zh: 帮应用挑选和优化商店分类的工具，解决开发者不知道选啥分类排名更高、更容易被推荐的问题。适合纠结主次分类怎么权衡，或者想通过换分类提升曝光和竞争力时使用。
